previous_campaign_summary: Search filters and saved searches, conversation templates with seeds, lightbox zoom/fullscreen/metadata panel, asset grid hover polish, network resilience with exponential backoff, asset metadata extraction, 49 unit tests. 18 phases completed, all CI passed.

objective_registry.user_value: Cross-device consistency for bookmarks, pins, reactions, edits

objective_registry.core_objective: Powerful search with filters and saved queries

objective_registry.user_value: Chat prompt templates with seed library

phases.objective: Command palette (Cmd+K) for quick navigation and actions
phases.scope: Global keyboard-driven command palette with fuzzy search across navigation, actions, conversations
phases.user_visible_gain: Power users can navigate and execute actions in 2-3 keystrokes via Cmd+K
phases.before_after: Users must click through menus and sidebars to access features
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created CommandPalette component with fuzzy matching, group ordering (navigation/conversation/action), keyboard nav (Up/Down/Enter/Esc), recent conversations top-10, action shortcuts (new conversation, onboarding, theme toggle). Bundle 588KB (+6KB). Cmd+K global shortcut.

phases.scope: Bulk select mode toggle, checkboxes per message, bulk action bar (copy/bookmark/select all)
phases.user_visible_gain: Power users can select multiple messages and copy or bookmark them in one operation
phases.before_after: Each message required individual action via per-message buttons
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Added bulk mode toggle in chat toolbar, per-message checkboxes, sticky bulk action bar with copy + bookmark + select all + clear. Shift+click range select. Bundle 590KB (+2KB).

phases.objective: Asset tagging system with filter UI
phases.scope: User-defined tags, tag picker, filter by tag, tag chips
phases.user_visible_gain: Users can organize hundreds of assets with custom tags
phases.before_after: Assets only filterable by upload/image/video kind
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created useAssetTags hook with localStorage persistence. TagPicker component with input, suggestions, removable chips. Tag filter row in toolbar. Tag chips on each asset card. Bundle 590KB (essentially same).

phases.scope: StatsPanel in chat sidebar: 4 stat cards (messages, conversations, images, videos), total storage, 7-day messages chart, asset breakdown by kind
phases.user_visible_gain: Users see their usage at a glance with counts, storage, and 7-day activity chart
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created StatsPanel component with 4 stat cards, storage display, 7-day bar chart, and asset kind breakdown. Integrated into right panel. Bundle 594KB (+4KB).

phases.objective: Code review and dead code cleanup
phases.user_visible_gain: Verified codebase health: 49 tests, clean lint, clean TS, no TODOs, no console.log
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, no unused locals/params, build succeeds
phases.notes: No issues found. 41 components, 23 hooks, 49 tests, no TODOs, no console.log, no unused code. Project is healthy.

phases.scope: Cheat sheet modal with categorized shortcuts, Cmd+/ shortcut, ? in normal context, filter input
phases.user_visible_gain: Users can discover and learn all available shortcuts via Cmd+/ or ? key
phases.before_after: Shortcuts exist but are not discoverable
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created KeyboardShortcutsHelp modal with 18 categorized shortcuts, useShortcutsHelp hook (Cmd+/ and ?), filter input, macOS key formatting, command palette integration. Bundle 598KB (+4KB). Cycle 1 complete.

phases.scope: Quick Markdown file export in chat toolbar with timestamp and safe filename
phases.user_visible_gain: One-click download chat history as .md file with timestamps
phases.before_after: Required going through modal to export
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Added quickExportMarkdown function: generates Markdown with title, date, timestamps per message, role formatting. Safe filename with date suffix. Renamed existing export button to 高级导出. Bundle 599KB (+1KB).

phases.scope: Pin/unpin toggle in sidebar, dedicated 置顶 section at top, star icon indicator
phases.user_visible_gain: Quick access to important conversations via dedicated pinned section
phases.before_after: All conversations sorted by date only
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created usePinnedConversations hook with localStorage persistence, partitionPinned utility. Pinned section in sidebar with star icon header. Pin button per conversation card. Bundle 601KB (+2KB).

phases.objective: Image generation grid and gallery view
phases.scope: PreviewRail: 2-col grid (3-col when expanded), expandable, image metadata, hover scale
phases.user_visible_gain: Users can browse all generated images in a clean grid, click to preview
phases.before_after: Single column with 6 items max, no expand, no metadata
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Rewrote PreviewRail: grid layout, expandable view, asset count badge, hover scale, image dimensions + size metadata. Bundle 600KB (essentially same).

phases.scope: Global drop overlay with visual feedback, multi-file upload via api.upload
phases.user_visible_gain: Drop files anywhere on the page to upload instantly
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created GlobalDropZone component. Listens to dragenter/dragover/drop on window. Full-screen overlay with upload icon and instruction. Bundle 602KB (+1KB).

phases.objective: Performance audit and bundle size optimization
phases.user_visible_gain: Verified bundle is healthy: 602KB main chunk, Mermaid/Cytoscape are lazy
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, no unused, build succeeds
phases.notes: Bundle 602KB (gzip 183KB). Main chunks already code-split: index 602KB, Mermaid lazy (~290KB), Cytoscape lazy (434KB), KaTeX lazy (288KB). All checks pass. No optimization needed at this time.

phases.objective: Video preset library and one-click presets
phases.scope: Curated video presets for common use cases
phases.user_visible_gain: Faster video generation with proven presets
phases.before_after: Users must configure preset each time

phases.scope: User preferences: theme, default size, default preset, etc.
Generate N variations of same prompt, see history

phases.objective: Welcome screen and empty states overhaul
phases.scope: Polished welcome, better empty states across all pages
Right-click context menu on messages with all actions
phases.before_after: Must use inline action buttons only

phases.scope: Full project health check, fix any issues found
phases.before_after: 3 campaigns of features, need quality gate
